raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Over the past two years, Assemblymember James C. Ramos introduced legislation to establish a Continuum of Care Coordinated Entry System for homeless youth.",
    "The Continuum of Care Coordinated Entry System would ensure equitable access to critical services for homeless youth.",
    "Assemblymember Ramos secured a one-time $31.5 million allocation in the 2025–26 state budget to stabilize 220 Foster Family Agencies across California.",
    "The funding allocation helps maintain placements for more than 7,400 foster youth while a long-term funding model is developed.",
    "Ramos established the Ramos Family Endowed Scholarship to support first-generation, low-income, and historically underserved students in higher education.",
    "During the 2023–2024 school year, nearly 32,000 students in San Bernardino County were identified as homeless under the federal McKinney-Vento Homeless Assistance Act."
  ]
}
```
